query:
SELECT 'cad_files' as tabelle, COUNT(*) as gesamt, SUM(CASE WHEN drive_file_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as mit_drive_id FROM cad_files
UNION ALL
SELECT 'project_documents', COUNT(*), SUM(CASE WHEN drive_file_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM project_documents
UNION ALL
SELECT 'customer_files', COUNT(*), COUNT(*) as mit_drive_id FROM customer_files;
